headline: Is Quanta Services, Inc. (PWR) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is PWR a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Quanta Services, Inc. on X.com by @MoneyShow. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on PWR. Quanta Services, Inc.’s share was trading at $691.95 as of May 13th. PWR’s trailing and forward P/E were 95.35 and 50.00 respectively according to Yahoo […]

headline: Quanta Services (PWR): Does A Record Backlog Really Clarify Its Grid And AI Infrastructure Edge?
summary: In recent months, Quanta Services reported quarterly earnings and revenues that exceeded expectations and highlighted a record US$48.50 billion backlog across utility, renewables, and data center projects. These results, alongside renewed analyst attention, underline how Quanta’s scale in critical power infrastructure positions it to capture AI- and electrification-related demand. Next, we’ll explore how this record backlog and upgraded outlook may influence Quanta’s existing investment...

headline: Dow Jones Futures Signal Market Bounce, But Then What? Oracle Dives, SpaceX IPO On Launch Pad
summary: Futures signal a market rebound from key levels, even as Oracle tumbles. Here's what to watch for. The SpaceX IPO is on tap.

headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Pops, Oracle Dives; SpaceX IPO On Launch Pad
summary: Futures were little changed while oil prices rose as Trump launched new U.S. attacks vs. Iran. Oracle tumbled on earnings. The SpaceX IPO is on tap.
